title: alsophila plagiostegia
intro: Alsophila plagiostegia, also known as the Golden Tree Fern, is a species of tree fern native to New Caledonia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Alsophila plagiostegia include infusions and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
